---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for VisualEyes
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-line description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What problem does this address? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Component

- [ ] Backend server
- [ ] System agent
- [ ] Kubernetes agent
- [ ] veye CLI
- [ ] React UI
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Links, references, mockups, or related issues.
